name: docker-scripts
description: Docker management scripts for MERN stack

scripts.docker:up:all: docker compose -f api-gateway-docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f production-docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:down:all: docker compose -f production-docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f api-gateway-docker-compose.yml down
scripts.docker:start:all: docker compose -f api-gateway-docker-compose.yml start && docker compose -f production-docker-compose.yml start
scripts.docker:stop:all: docker compose -f production-docker-compose.yml stop && docker compose -f api-gateway-docker-compose.yml stop
